allow: Bash(npm info next@16.0.0 changelog --json 2>/dev/null | head -100 || npm view next@16 description 2>/dev/null)
Bash(npm info @as-integrations/next peerDependencies 2>/dev/null && npm info @next/bundle-analyzer@latest version 2>/dev/null && npm info eslint-config-next@latest version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(npm info next@16.0.0 --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('description',''\)\)")

Bash(npm pack next@16.1.6 --dry-run 2>/dev/null | head -5; npm info next@16.1.6 --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['engines','keywords']]" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(npm info @as-integrations/next versions --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(versions[-5:]\)")
